radio_buttons.description: Configuration for the subscription package selection radio buttons, including their visual style, individual button items, and interaction behavior.

indicator_alignment.description: Controls the position of the radio indicator circle. Possible values: 'right' (indicator on the right side), 'none' (indicator hidden), or any other value / omitted (indicator on the left side, the default).

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

buttons.description: Array of individual radio button items, each referencing a subscription button component and defining its selection state and visual styling.

badge.description: Configuration for the badge label displayed on the radio button, typically used to show promotional text such as savings percentages or 'Best Value'.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

color.description: Background color of the badge when the radio button is selected. Color value resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color of the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state. Color value resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

deselected_bg_color.description: Background color of the badge when the radio button is in the deselected state. Color value resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

variant.description: Visual variant identifier for the badge styling.

hide_on_deselected_state.description: When true, the badge is hidden when the radio button is in the deselected state and only shown when selected.

text.description: Text displayed on the badge label of the radio button. May contain dynamic placeholders wrapped in '%%' that get replaced with package price information.

selected_bg_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Color value resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

disabled_text_color.description: Text color of the radio button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state. Color value resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

selected_border_color.description: Border color of the radio button when it is in the selected state. Color value resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

is_selected.description: Whether this radio button is initially selected (pre-selected state) when the screen loads.

is_enlarged_button_component.description: When true, the radio button uses a larger height, bolder typography (T6 Bold for title, T4 Semi-Bold for subtitle), and additional styling for the background container.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the subscription button component from the 'subscription_button' remote settings collection. References the package and styling information.

disabled_background_color.description: Background color of the radio button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state. Color value resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

border_color.description: Border color of the radio button when it is in the deselected (unselected) state. Color value resolved via the Design System CascadeColorPackage.

gradient_type.description: Name of a CascadeGradients entry used as the badge background gradient. Matched case-insensitively against CascadeGradients enum values (e.g. 'PRIMARY'). When empty, a solid color drawable is used instead.

purchase_on_select.description: When true, enables double-tap to purchase behavior on the radio buttons, allowing users to initiate a purchase by double-tapping a selected radio button.

type.description: The visual style of the radio buttons. When set to 'tiers_style', uses the TiersStyle layout; otherwise defaults to DefaultStyle.

trial_reminder_toggle.description: Configuration for the trial reminder toggle that allows users to opt in to receiving reminders about their free trial period.

is_enabled.description: Whether the trial reminder toggle is enabled. Defaults to false if not specified. When false, the toggle is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the trial reminder toggle component from the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings collection.

toggle_placeholder_text.description: Configuration for placeholder text displayed near the toggle component, mapped as a title component to show descriptive text about the toggle.

is_enabled.description: Whether the toggle placeholder text is enabled. Defaults to true if not specified. When false, the text is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the toggle placeholder text component from the 'offer_toggle_placeholder_text' remote settings collection.

content_id.description: Identifier used to match this screen configuration to a requested screen variant. The app looks up a screen by matching this value against the requested screen name, falling back to 'default' if no match is found.

footer.description: Configuration for a footer component on the subscription screen. Defined in the data model but not currently consumed by the screen rendering logic.

is_enabled.description: Whether the footer component is enabled. When false, the component is not displayed.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the footer component from remote settings.

banner.description: Configuration for the main subscription banner displayed at the top of the screen. Supports click callbacks that can open deep link hooks.

is_enabled.description: Whether the banner component is enabled. Defaults to true if not specified. When false, the banner is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the banner component from the 'offer_screen_banners' remote settings collection.

description.description: Configuration for a description text component on the subscription screen. Defined in the data model but not currently consumed by the screen rendering logic.

is_enabled.description: Whether the description component is enabled. When false, the component is not displayed.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the description component from remote settings.

title.description: Configuration for the screen title text element displayed with T6 typography and semi-bold font weight.

is_enabled.description: Whether the title component is enabled. Defaults to true if not specified. When false, the title is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the title component from the 'offer_screen_titles' remote settings collection.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

close_button.description: Configuration for the close button that dismisses the offer screen. Supports custom icon URL, alignment (left or right), and margin settings.

is_enabled.description: Whether the close button component is enabled. Defaults to true if not specified. When false, the close button is not fetched from remote config.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the close button component from the 'subscription_screen_close_button' remote settings collection.

subtitle.description: Configuration for the screen subtitle text element displayed with T5 typography and medium font weight.

is_enabled.description: Whether the subtitle component is enabled. Defaults to true if not specified. When false, the subtitle is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the subtitle component from the 'offer_screen_subtitles' remote settings collection.

banner_placeholder.description: Configuration for the banner placeholder area, which displays text and optionally a badge image with a shadow effect above the banner.

is_enabled.description: Whether the banner placeholder component is enabled. Defaults to true if not specified. When false, the component is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the banner placeholder component from the 'offer_banner_placeholder_text' remote settings collection.

secondary_button.description: Configuration for a secondary action button displayed with underlined text. When tapped, it either opens a deep link action or shows the subscription tiers half-screen.

is_enabled.description: Whether the secondary button is enabled. Defaults to true if not specified. When false, the button is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the secondary button component from the 'offer_screen_secondary_button' remote settings collection.

logo.description: Configuration for a logo component on the subscription screen. Defined in the data model but not currently consumed by the screen rendering logic.

is_enabled.description: Whether the logo component is enabled. When false, the logo is not displayed.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the logo component from remote settings.

switch_package_toggle.description: Configuration for the package switching toggle that allows users to switch between different subscription packages (e.g. toggling a free trial option on/off).

is_enabled.description: Whether the switch package toggle is enabled. Defaults to true if not specified. When false, the toggle is not fetched or displayed.

$stable.description: Compose compiler stability flag. Used internally by the Kotlin Compose compiler for recomposition optimization.

id.description: Identifier used to look up the switch toggle component from the 'offer_promotion_toggle' remote settings collection.
